resources.string: Find resale tickets for sold-out events
Don\'t have an account? Sign Up
Already have an account? Log In
Sign up to discover thousands of events
Please agree to the terms of use
Password must be at least 6 characters
Something went wrong. Please try again.
You don\'t have any tickets yet!
Please fill in all required fields (*)
How did you hear about this event?
Please agree to the VibeTix Rules
Thank you! Your e-ticket has been issued and sent to your email.
Select a ticket you purchased in the \'Purchased Tickets\' tab and click \'Resell Ticket\' to list it!
Discover events and book tickets for memorable experiences waiting for you.
Your purchase history will appear here.
You have no tickets listed for resale!
Resell your ticket to give others a chance to attend and easily get your money back.
You have no tickets awaiting payment.
You have no successfully paid tickets.
VIP membership programs are being prepared for launch!
Align the QR code within the frame to scan
Align the QR code within the frame
We couldn\'t find any data to display.
End date must be after start date
Create your first event and start selling tickets!
Do you want to save the entered information as a draft?
Please select or enter an Organizer
Please enter Organizer Name, Email and Phone
Go to Security & Password to reset your PIN
This artist has already been added
Please enter the online event URL
Please enter max tickets per transaction
Max tickets must be greater than 0
Please add at least one ticket type
No user found with this email
This staff member already exists in the event
Camera permission is required to scan QR codes
End date must be on or after start date
Please log in to save favorite events
Unable to read image, please try again
Failed to save PIN, please try again
Please set up your PIN first
Password change failed. Please try again.
Please log in again to change your password
No matching discount for this order
Please log in to purchase tickets
You cannot buy a ticket you listed yourself
Apple login is not yet supported
Please select at least 1 ticket to sell
Please select a payment method type
Price must be greater than 0 for %s
This artist is already in the list!
Explore events and book tickets for unforgettable experiences waiting for you.
Protect Ticket Details page with PIN
• E-ticket will be sent to your email after successful payment.\n• Please arrive 15 minutes early for check-in.\n• Tickets are non-refundable. Please see detailed terms.
How did you hear about this event?
VietQR Transfer (Scan QR code to pay)
I have read and agree to VibeTix\'s Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
Please check your network or try a different category.
Try changing filters or search for another keyword
VibeTix helps you buy and sell tickets easily and safely. Below is helpful information about the platform.
Create and manage your events easily and professionally with VibeTix.
Create events for free, no limit
Scan QR codes for fast check-in
This feature is for verified organizers.\nComing soon in next version! 🚀
Create your first profile to start\nmanaging your events
Add a method for faster checkout
No introduction available for this artist.
No events from this artist on the platform yet.
Drag the piece to the correct position to complete the image
← Drag right to piece together the image →
List your ticket on the VibeTix marketplace. The buyer will receive a new ticket and funds will be transferred to your account after the transaction is successful.
Place QR code inside the frame to scan
No tickets listed for resale yet.
No resale tickets for this event.
Please show this QR code to the check-in staff at the entrance to enter the event.
Select an event to start managing
Add at least 1 ticket type to submit for review
Tap \'+ Add ticket type\' to get started
Not required — you can add later
For group purchases of 3 or more
✅ Buy 3+ tickets at the same time
✅ Applies to all events currently on sale
Create the first ticket type\nfor your event
Your application will be reviewed within 1–3 business days. We will notify you by email when there is a result.
Thank you for booking with VibeTix.\nE-ticket has been sent to your email and saved in My Tickets.
Please set up a PIN first
New PINs do not match, try again
Failed to save PIN, try again later
Please fill in all required fields
New password must be at least 6 characters
Please log in again to change password
Password change failed. Try again later.
Select a purchased ticket in the \'Purchased\' tab then tap \'Resell ticket\' to list it!
Explore events and book tickets for memorable experiences waiting for you.
Your ticket purchase history will appear here.
Resell your ticket so others can attend the event.
You have no successfully sold tickets yet.
You have no cancelled listings yet.
Please log in to save favourite events
💡 Pricing 10–20%% lower will help sell faster.
Price must be greater than 0 for %1$s
Please select at least 1 ticket to sell
Ticket purchasing will be added soon!
No matching code for this order
Load complete. Place QR code in frame to scan
This staff already exists in the event
User not found with this email
End date must be after start date
End date must be on or after start date
Cannot reduce below tickets already sold (%1$d sold)!
This artist has already been added
Please enter max tickets per order
Max tickets must be greater than 0
Please add at least one ticket type
This artist is already in the list!
Please check your internet connection and try again.
Please try a different filter or keyword.
Please select a payment method type
Please log in to buy tickets
You cannot buy back a ticket you listed yourself
Apple sign-in is not yet supported
